message:
fix(fp-groupby): prevent integer overflow in HyperLogLog estimate

HLL registers can store rho values up to 64 (from leading_zeros()).
The old code used `2_u32.pow(r)` which overflows when r > 31.

Fix: use `2_f64.powi(i32::from(r))` which handles the full range.

Added test: hll_high_rho_does_not_overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
